expectations.text: uses-private-content-loaded-event: Listens for the `private-content-loaded` window event (Hyvä's section data event), not Knockout/customerData
expectations.evidence:
matched: ...show.
                // The 'private-content-loaded' event fires after Hyva loads...

expectations.text: reads-customer-firstname-from-event-detail: Accesses customer.firstname from event.detail.data (Hyvä's section data shape)
uses-child-theme-path: Places the template inside a child theme path under app/design/frontend/, not vendor or Hyva/default
uses-hyva-layout-handle-prefix: Uses a hyva_-prefixed layout handle (or hyva_default) for the layout XML override
includes-x-cloak: Uses x-cloak to prevent flash of unstyled content while Alpine initializes
expectations.evidence: matched: ...v x-data="welcomeBackModal()" x-cloak>` and inline the component de...

expectations.text: session-deduplication: Uses sessionStorage / hyva.getBrowserStorage / $persist or similar to show the modal once per session
uses-escaper: Uses Magento's $escaper helper for output (escapeHtml or escapeHtmlAttr)
no-knockout-or-requirejs: Does NOT suggest data-bind, customerData.get, requirejs-config, or x-magento-init (Luma artifacts)
mentions-tailwind-rebuild: Mentions running `npm run build` or `npm run watch` from web/tailwind (or notes new classes need a rebuild)
